prompt: In Rust, write a function named sum_i32 that returns the sum of an &[i32]. Include one unit test.
Revise the Rust sum_i32 function so it handles an empty slice explicitly. Include one unit test.
Add a Rust function named mean_i32 that returns Option<f64> for an &[i32]. Include one unit test.
Refactor the Rust mean_i32 function to reuse sum_i32. Include one unit test.
Write a Rust function named clamp_i32(value, min, max) that clamps a value. Include one unit test.
Revise clamp_i32 to return Result<i32, &'static str> when min is greater than max. Include one unit test.
Write a TypeScript function named uniqueStrings that preserves first occurrence order. Include one tiny test.
Revise uniqueStrings to ignore empty strings while preserving order. Include one tiny test.
Write a TypeScript function named groupByPrefix that groups strings by the text before ':'. Include one tiny test.
Revise groupByPrefix to put strings without ':' into an 'ungrouped' bucket. Include one tiny test.
Draft a concise changelog entry for adding session_id to a binary inference protocol.
Revise the changelog entry to mention n-gram speculative pools keyed by session_id.
